content: KeyboardShortcuts library behavior: NSMenu puts event loop into tracking mode which pauses global hotkeys. NSPopover does NOT post NSMenu didBeginTracking/didEndTracking notifications. Current MenuView.onDisappear posts didEndTrackingNotification manually as workaround for MenuBarExtra's unbalanced tracking. When switching to NSStatusItem + NSPopover: NSPopover open/close should NOT trigger menu-tracking mode, so global hotkey should survive. Real NSMenu (right-click) posts genuine balanced notifications. Remove the manual post; test empirically; re-add only if a real imbalance is observed with the new NSStatusItem shell.
